hero.title: FoodVery
hero.subtitle: Café
hero.description: Breakfast and coffee crafted with care in Las Terrenas, Dominican Republic

breakfast.title: Complete Breakfast
breakfast.description: Fresh eggs, toast, coffee and more

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: An authentic experience in Las Terrenas
about.description: At FoodVery Café, we are dedicated to providing a unique gastronomic experience that combines Dominican tradition with fresh ingredients and modern techniques. Located in the heart of Las Terrenas, we are the perfect place to start your day with the best breakfast and coffee.

fresh.title: Fresh Ingredients
fresh.description: We use only the best local and fresh ingredients

passion.title: Prepared with Passion
passion.description: Every dish and drink is prepared with love and attention to detail

community.title: Part of the Community
community.description: Proud to be part of the vibrant Las Terrenas community

downloadApp.title: Download the App
downloadApp.subtitle: Get the FoodVery Café app for easy ordering, exclusive deals, and seamless pickup. Available on iOS and Android.

easyOrdering.title: Easy Ordering
easyOrdering.description: Browse our menu and place orders in just a few taps

quickPickup.title: Quick Pickup
quickPickup.description: Order ahead and skip the line with our pickup system

exclusiveDeals.title: Exclusive Deals
exclusiveDeals.description: Get special offers and loyalty rewards only available in the app

cta.title: Start Your Day Right
cta.subtitle: Join us for breakfast and coffee that will make your morning special

coffee.tagline: Flavors that excite + ambiance that captivates

services.title: Services
services.intro: At FoodVery we offer various services designed for the community and visitors:

breakfast.title: Breakfast & Coffee
breakfast.description: Daily service at the location with take-out options and delivery on request.

apartments.title: Apartment Rentals
apartments.description: We manage short-term tourist rentals in the area — ask about availability.

catering.title: Catering & Events
catering.description: We offer catering for small events and service for corporate or social gatherings.

footer.description: Your daily dose of tropical energy. Proudly serving the Las Terrenas community since 2025.

images.downloadApps: Download our app and explore great benefits

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: At FoodVery Café, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.

information.title: Information We Collect
information.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, place an order, or communicate with us.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use your information to process orders, improve our services, and communicate with you about special offers.

sharing.title: Sharing Information
sharing.content: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties, except when necessary to comply with the law.

security.title: Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us.
